description: Run a Cognos report in CSV or JSON output format and materialize the result as a Dagster DataFrame. Foundation for Cognos → warehouse / dbt pipelines. Parameter overrides supported.

report_id.label: Report ID
report_id.description: Cognos Store ID for the report.

output_format.label: Output Format
output_format.description: Report output format. Only CSV and JSON are parseable to DataFrames.
